_comment: v27-3 OFFSET 分页压测参数化配置 (ADR #5 决策依据)
_scale_note: scale_to_millions 触发时扩容到 1M products + 5M xref + 1M apps (符合 hard constraint)
_offsets_note: OFFSET 深度档位 (50K 数据下最深 40000, 1M 数据下可加 100000/500000)
_scenarios_note: where_extra 加在基础 WHERE (is_published + EXISTS xref) 之后, 模拟不同查询条件

scenarios.name: baseline
scenarios.desc: 无额外过滤 (仅 is_published + EXISTS xref)

scenarios.name: type_oil
scenarios.desc: type='OIL FILTER' 分类过滤 (实际 type 值含 FILTER 后缀)

scenarios.name: size_d1_100
scenarios.desc: 尺寸范围 (d1_mm BETWEEN 95 AND 105, ±5mm 容差)

scenarios.name: composite
scenarios.desc: 组合查询 (type + 尺寸, 最差场景)
scenarios.where_extra: AND p.type = 'OIL FILTER' AND p.d1_mm BETWEEN 95 AND 105

_keyset_note: keyset 简化对比: WHERE p.id > :last_id (id 单调递增, 不模拟三层排序完整 keyset)
